properties.Observation: Part of the main irrigation canal has been concreted, while a section of about one hundred meters needs to be newly constructed. About fifteen acres of paddy fields are cultivated under this canal.

properties.Observation: An anicut has been built across the Mee Pana Oya and there are three open space 900mm long in the anicut wall. To get water into the canal, those open areas need to be raised by one hundred and fifty millimeters.
